title: grammar export gbnf/lark/ebnf
manager: Export FSL's grammar in the formats other tools speak — GBNF (for LLM-constrained generation), Lark, EBNF — so external parsers, generators, and LLM samplers can work with FSL syntax natively. GBNF in particular means a language model can be constrained to emit only valid FSL, which is directly load-bearing for the AI-distribution era. The exports ride the grammar dual, so they stay in sync with the real grammar instead of rotting.
cs: grammar export to gbnf/lark/ebnf; rides the C3 grammar dual (WP10.1); GBNF enables constrained LLM generation (era-7 distribution); generated, not hand-maintained.
